title: Minimize Maximum of Array
titleCn: 最小化数组中的最大值

testcases.input: nums = [3,7,1,6] Output: 5 Explanation: One set of optimal operations is as follows: 1. Choose i = 1, and nums becomes [4,6,1,6]. 2. Choose i = 3, and nums becomes [4,6,2,5]. 3. Choose i = 1, and nums becomes [5,5,2,5]. The maximum integer of nums is 5. It can be shown that the maximum number cannot be less than 5. Therefore, we return 5.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: One set of optimal operations is as follows: 1. Choose i = 1, and nums becomes [4,6,1,6]. 2. Choose i = 3, and nums becomes [4,6,2,5]. 3. Choose i = 1, and nums becomes [5,5,2,5]. The maximum integer of nums is 5. It can be shown that the maximum number cannot be less than 5. Therefore, we return 5.

testcases.input: nums = [10,1] Output: 10 Explanation: It is optimal to leave nums as is, and since 10 is the maximum value, we return 10.
testcases.expectedOutput: 10 Explanation: It is optimal to leave nums as is, and since 10 is the maximum value, we return 10.
